criteria.name: controls_are_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: Every interactive control — suite entries, toolbar controls including Export results, Import results, Undo, and Redo, table headers, row actions, step retry and pause/resume, and form fields — is reachable and operable with Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, or Space
criteria.reasoning: Native buttons, inputs, table-header buttons, suite entries, row actions, and step controls were present in the tab order. Evidence: ACCESS-INIT-shared.png

criteria.name: modals_and_drawer_manage_focus
criteria.description: New Suite, Edit Suite, confirmation modals, and the export drawer trap focus while open, close on Escape, and return focus to the control that opened them
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Opening New Suite, Import results, and Export results left focus outside the overlay instead of trapping focus; Escape did close and restore focus for New Suite. Evidence: MODAL-FOCUS-shared.png, IMPORT-MODAL-shared.png, EXPORT-DRAWER-shared.png

criteria.name: icons_have_accessible_names
criteria.description: Toolbar icons, step status icons, and moon badge affordances expose accessible names or labels rather than unlabeled icon-only controls
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Several icon-only controls, including night-mode switches and some row/step action buttons, had no accessible name; status SVGs were inconsistently labeled. Evidence: ACCESS-INIT-shared.png

criteria.name: run_events_use_live_regions
criteria.description: Eval run completion and a step entering the failed state are announced through an aria-live region as well as shown visually
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Completion was announced in an assertive live region, but no failed step state could be reached and verified during the live run. Evidence: RUN-LIVE-shared.png

criteria.name: forms_have_explicit_labels
criteria.description: Suite name, prompt selection, night start/end time, and import fields have visible labels, and validation messages are associated with their fields
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Suite name, prompt selection, and import JSON had visible labels, but Night start time and Night end time were not associated with explicit labels; full form-label coverage therefore failed. Evidence: NIGHT-WINDOW-FORMS-shared.png

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: App title and panel headings follow a logical heading order without skips across the suite list, results, charts, and export drawer
criteria.reasoning: The rendered hierarchy used one H1 for Eval Studio followed by H2 panel headings without skipped levels. Evidence: ACCESS-INIT-shared.png

criteria.name: landmark_navigation_is_present
criteria.description: The layout exposes navigation/sidebar and main content landmarks so keyboard and assistive-tech users can move between the suite list and results region
criteria.reasoning: The page exposed banner, complementary sidebar, and main content landmarks, separating suite navigation from results. Evidence: ACCESS-INIT-shared.png

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: Body text, table text, score badges, and toolbar controls meet readable contrast against their surfaces
criteria.reasoning: Rendered body/table text and toolbar controls had strong foreground/background contrast; sampled values were dark text on light surfaces and light toolbar text on a dark header. Evidence: ACCESS-INIT-shared.png

criteria.name: semantic_html_roles_are_used
criteria.description: Suite entries, toolbar buttons, table headers, and dialog/drawer overlays use semantic controls or appropriate roles rather than clickable plain divs
criteria.reasoning: Suite entries and toolbar controls were native buttons, sortable table headers were buttons inside TH elements, and dialogs used role=dialog with labeled overlays. Evidence: ACCESS-INIT-shared.png, EXPORT-DRAWER-shared.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_is_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, staggered result rows, chart bar growth, and drawer/modal transitions apply instantly / appear simultaneously as specified
criteria.reasoning: In the reduced-motion browser, prefers-reduced-motion matched true; result rows had zero delay and ~0s duration, and chart transitions/animations were reduced to 1e-6s. Evidence: REDUCED-MOTION-shared.png

criteria.name: multi_facet_reload_resets_seeded
criteria.description: Multi-facet round-trip: create a suite, toggle Night Mode, sort results descending, open comparison, then reload — all facets coherently reset to the seeded baseline (seeded suites, historical runs, default view, no night-mode schedules), never a mix of persisted and reset state
criteria.reasoning: Reload reset to 3 seeded suites, Customer care quality/results view, all Night Mode switches false, and no active schedule. Evidence: multi_facet_reload_resets_seeded-shared.png

criteria.name: score_sort_reversal
criteria.description: Sort-reversal proof: sort the results table by score ascending, note the order, then sort descending; the order reverses relative to ascending
criteria.reasoning: Observed ascending scores 92, 93, 94, 96, 96, 99, then descending 99, 96, 96, 94, 93, 92. Evidence: score_sort_reversal-shared.png

criteria.name: charts_track_new_run
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: complete a new run and confirm the bar chart redraws with new per-model averages and the trend line gains a new point rather than redrawing identically
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The new run changed result rows, but the trend labels remained Jul 12–Jul 18 with no new point; full chart redraw sensitivity was not satisfied. Evidence: charts_track_new_run-shared.png

criteria.name: comparison_echoes_results
criteria.description: Cross-view echo: note a prompt's score in the results table, switch to comparison, and confirm the same prompt/model cell shows that score without reload
criteria.reasoning: Comparison view showed the same prompt/model scores as the results table without reload, including 93/92/96 and 94/96/99. Evidence: comparison_echoes_results-shared.png

criteria.name: suite_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: measure the suite list count immediately before and after a valid New Suite submit; the delta is exactly +1
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: WebMCP creation returned success, but the visible suite count remained 3 rather than increasing to 4. Evidence: suite_count_delta_exact-shared.png

criteria.name: two_runs_differ
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: run the same suite twice and confirm the two result sets are not byte-identical in scores and latencies
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Two runs of the same suite produced identical exported scores and latencies (93/951, 92/1178, 96/1689, 94/1965, 96/1063, 99/1354). Evidence: export_contains_session_run-shared.png

criteria.name: export_contains_session_run
criteria.description: Full-pipeline export probe: complete a run, open Export results, and confirm the JSON results array length equals the visible table row count and each exported score matches the corresponding row
criteria.reasoning: Export drawer visibly reported 6 result records, and its JSON contained six results whose scores matched the visible table rows. Evidence: export_contains_session_run-shared.png

criteria.name: import_export_round_trip
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: export JSON after a run, overwrite latest results so the table differs, import the JSON, and confirm table, charts, suite badge, and a fresh export match the imported document
criteria.reasoning: Imported JSON replaced the latest run; the table showed two imported rows, charts reflected average 80, the Engineering copilot badge remained active, and fresh export reported 2 result records with matching values. Evidence: import_export_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_round_trip
criteria.description: Undo round-trip: create a suite, Undo removes it, Redo restores the same name and prompt count, and the suite count returns to the post-create value
criteria.reasoning: After creating Undo Verifier, Undo removed it and restored the count to 3; Redo restored the same suite name, 1 prompt, and count 4. Evidence: undo_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.name: seeded_suite_list_complete
criteria.description: On load, the left panel lists at least 3 seeded eval suites, and each entry shows a suite name, a prompt count, a last-run timestamp, and an average score badge
criteria.reasoning: Three seeded suites visibly list names, prompt counts, last-run times, and average scores. Evidence: seeded_suite_list_complete-shared.png

criteria.name: create_suite_flow
criteria.description: Clicking New Suite opens a modal with a suite name field and a prompt multi-select; the Submit control is disabled until a name is entered and at least one prompt is selected, and submitting a valid form closes the modal and adds exactly one new entry to the suite list
criteria.reasoning: New Suite modal showed name and prompt selection, disabled Submit initially, then valid submission added exactly one suite. Evidence: create_suite_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: invalid_create_validation
criteria.description: Attempting to submit New Suite with an empty suite name, a name longer than 80 characters, or zero prompts selected shows an inline validation message naming the offending field, and the suite list gains no entry
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Empty-name validation was visible, but longer-name and zero-prompt submission cases were not fully exercised. Evidence: create_suite_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: edit_suite_prefilled_updates
criteria.description: Choosing a suite entry's Edit action opens the form prefilled with that suite's name and prompt selection, and saving updates the entry's name and prompt count in the list without a page reload
criteria.reasoning: Edit opened prefilled name and prompt selection; saving changed the suite name without reload. Evidence: edit_suite_prefilled_updates-shared.png

criteria.name: delete_confirm_cancel
criteria.description: Choosing a suite's Delete action opens a confirmation dialog; confirming removes exactly that suite from the list, while canceling leaves the suite intact
criteria.reasoning: Delete opened confirmation, Cancel preserved the suite, and confirmation removed it. Evidence: edit_suite_prefilled_updates-shared.png

criteria.name: run_steps_visible_progression
criteria.description: Clicking Run Suite shows one visible step per prompt in the suite, each labeled with its prompt title, and step statuses advance visibly through pending, running, and complete (or failed) as the simulated run progresses
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Final complete state was observed, but pending/running progression was not directly observed. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: run_log_streams_progressively
criteria.description: During a run started from the real Run Suite control, the inline run log grows progressively — lines appear incrementally over the course of the run, not all at once — and a status affordance distinguishes waiting, running, and complete states
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The completed log showed multiple timestamped lines, but progressive growth during the run was not directly observed. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: retry_backoff_attempt_counter
criteria.description: When a simulated step failure occurs, the step shows a retrying state with a visible backoff countdown and an attempt counter (such as retry 2 of 3) before the retry executes
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: No simulated retrying/backoff state was observed. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: failed_retry_resumes_from_step
criteria.description: A step that exhausts its retries is marked failed with an inline error summary and a manual Retry control; activating that control resumes the run from that step, and steps completed earlier keep their original outputs and timestamps without re-executing
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: No exhausted-retry failure or manual Retry workflow was observed. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: pause_resume_checkpoint
criteria.description: Pausing a running suite freezes step progression at the current step; resuming continues from exactly that step, and steps completed before the pause remain unchanged
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Pause/resume was not exercised. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: rollup_derives_from_steps
criteria.description: A run-level rollup shows completed count out of total (n of m), overall elapsed duration, and failure count, and these values update live as step statuses advance during a run
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Rollup fields were visible, but live updates while steps advanced were not observed. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: event_timeline_filter_highlight
criteria.description: The run's event timeline lists step transitions in order with timestamps, filtering the timeline by status narrows the visible entries, and selecting a timeline entry highlights the corresponding step in the step list
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Timeline entries were visible, but filtering and selection highlighting were not exercised. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: run_completion_updates_suite
criteria.description: When a run finishes, the results panel populates with that run's rows, and the suite entry's last-run timestamp and average score badge update to reflect the new run without a reload
criteria.reasoning: After completion, results populated and the suite entry showed updated timestamp and average score. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: results_table_columns_pass_badge
criteria.description: The results table shows columns for prompt title, model, score (0 to 100), latency in milliseconds, tokens used, and a pass/fail badge, and rows with a score of 70 or above show Pass while rows below 70 show Fail
criteria.reasoning: Results visibly included prompt, model, score, latency, tokens, and Pass/Fail badges consistent with scores. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: column_sort_round_trip
criteria.description: Clicking a results column header sorts the table by that column ascending, clicking the same header again reverses the order to descending, and the reordering is consistent with the visible cell values (proving sort derives from live data)
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Ascending and descending sort round-trip was not exercised. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: detail_panel_with_disclosure
criteria.description: Clicking a result row opens a detail panel showing the full prompt text, the model response, and a per-dimension scoring breakdown inside a collapsible region that is collapsed by default, expands on activation, and remembers its open state per result while the app is open
criteria.reasoning: Selecting a row opened full prompt and response details; scoring breakdown was collapsed then expanded and showed dimensions. Evidence: detail_panel_with_disclosure-shared.png

criteria.name: charts_render_with_tooltip
criteria.description: A bar chart shows the average score per model for the selected suite's latest run and hovering a bar with the real pointer shows a tooltip with the model name and exact score; a line chart below it plots average score across the suite's last 7 runs with run dates on the x-axis
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Charts rendered, but pointer hover tooltip evidence was not observed. Evidence: seeded_suite_list_complete-shared.png

criteria.name: charts_update_on_new_run
criteria.description: Completing a new run appends one new point to the trend line chart and redraws the bar chart to reflect the new run's per-model averages — the charts visibly change when their input data changes
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: A second completed run and visible chart change were not observed. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: comparison_view_coherent
criteria.description: The toolbar comparison toggle switches to a side-by-side table with one column per model and one row per prompt where each cell shows score and latency; the score in any comparison cell matches the results table for the same prompt and model, and toggling back restores the results view with the prior sort intact
criteria.reasoning: Comparison view showed one column per model, prompt rows, and matching score/latency values from the results table. Evidence: comparison_view_coherent-shared.png

criteria.name: night_scheduling_flow
criteria.description: The Night Window settings form saves startTime and endTime as HH:MM with end after start and shows the configured window in the toolbar, rejecting a missing time, a non-HH:MM value, or an end not after the start with inline messages naming the field; toggling Night Mode on a suite shows a moon icon badge on the entry and toggling it off removes the badge
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Valid save and toolbar window were observed, but invalid validation and night-mode badge on/off behavior were not fully exercised. Evidence: comparison_view_coherent-shared.png

criteria.name: suite_switch_swaps_context
criteria.description: Selecting a different suite in the left panel swaps the results table, both charts, and the detail panel context to that suite's latest run without a full page reload
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Switching between suites and verifying all context surfaces was not exercised. Evidence: seeded_suite_list_complete-shared.png

criteria.name: double_activation_single_effect
criteria.description: Rapidly double-activating Run Suite starts exactly one run (one step-list fill, one new trend point), and rapidly double-activating the New Suite Submit control creates exactly one suite (the count increases by exactly one)
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Rapid double activation tests were not exercised. Evidence: create_suite_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_states_present
criteria.description: A never-run suite shows an empty state in the results region explaining that running the suite populates results; deleting the currently selected suite clears the results panel and charts to an empty state with a message and a control to select or create a suite; filtering the event timeline to a status with no entries shows an empty state message
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Never-run empty state was observed, but filtered-empty timeline and post-delete empty chart state were not both verified. Evidence: create_suite_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: long_title_truncation
criteria.description: A prompt title longer than 60 characters renders truncated with an ellipsis in the results table row and is shown in full in the detail panel
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: A prompt title longer than 60 characters was not tested. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: rerun_replaces_and_caps_trend
criteria.description: Running the same suite a second time replaces the latest-run results, appends exactly one new trend point, and the trend chart never plots more than the last 7 runs
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: A second run and trend cap behavior were not exercised. Evidence: run_steps_visible_progression-shared.png

criteria.name: suite_payload_field_contract
criteria.description: A valid New Suite submit requires name (1 to 80 characters after trim) and at least one promptId; the new list entry shows that name and a prompt count matching the selected prompts
criteria.reasoning: Valid creation used a trimmed name and selected prompt IDs; the resulting entry showed matching name and prompt count. Evidence: create_suite_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: export_results_json_csv_live
criteria.description: After a completed run, Export results opens a drawer whose JSON tab shows version 1 with suite, run, and results fields matching the normative export shape, the CSV tab has header promptTitle,model,score,latencyMs,tokens,passFail, and the results array length and scores match the visible results table
criteria.reasoning: Export drawer showed live JSON with version, suite, run, results and matching records; CSV showed the required header and rows. Evidence: export_results_json_csv_live-shared.png

criteria.name: export_download_and_copy
criteria.description: In the export drawer, Download JSON offers eval-run-results.json matching the JSON tab, Download CSV offers eval-run-results.csv matching the CSV tab, and Copy on the active tab shows a visible Copied confirmation that clears within 5 seconds
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Download controls and Copy confirmation were not activated. Evidence: export_results_json_csv_live-shared.png

criteria.name: import_results_round_trip
criteria.description: Importing a previously exported results JSON replaces the selected suite's latest-run results so the table, charts, suite average score badge, and a subsequent export match the imported document
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Import round-trip was not exercised. Evidence: export_results_json_csv_live-shared.png

criteria.name: import_rejects_invalid_payload
criteria.description: Importing malformed JSON, a document missing required keys, a score outside 0 to 100, or a passFail that disagrees with its score shows an inline error naming the import field and leaves the current results unchanged
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Invalid import payload cases were not exercised. Evidence: export_results_json_csv_live-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_suite_mutations
criteria.description: After creating a suite, Undo removes that suite and decreases the list count by one; Redo restores the same suite name and prompt count
criteria.reasoning: After creating a suite, Undo visibly reduced the list from four to three and enabled Redo; Redo was activated to restore the mutation. Evidence: create_suite_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: result_row_field_contract
criteria.description: Each results table row exposes prompt title, model, score 0 to 100, latency in ms, tokens, and pass/fail consistent with score at or above 70 marking Pass; the detail panel shows promptText, response, and a scoringBreakdown with at least one dimension score
criteria.reasoning: Rows exposed prompt title, model, bounded score, latency, tokens, and consistent pass/fail; detail showed prompt text, response, and dimension scores. Evidence: detail_panel_with_disclosure-shared.png

criteria.name: seed_depth_populates_charts_first_load
criteria.description: On first load, without running anything, each seeded suite carries at least 5 prompts (visible in its prompt count) and at least 7 historical runs, so the selected suite's results table, bar chart, and trend line chart are all non-empty before any session run
criteria.reasoning: Initial load showed seeded suites with 5–7 prompts, populated results, bar chart, and a seven-run trend. Evidence: seeded_suite_list_complete-shared.png

criteria.name: export_json_run_metadata_keys
criteria.description: The export JSON tab's document carries the full normative run metadata: a suite object with name, promptCount, and nightMode; a run object with id, startedAt and finishedAt as ISO-8601 datetime strings, averageScore between 0 and 100 matching the suite's badge, passCount and failCount consistent with the visible Pass/Fail badges, and non-negative totalLatencyMs and totalTokens
criteria.reasoning: JSON visibly contained suite name/promptCount/nightMode, ISO timestamps, averageScore, pass/fail counts, and non-negative latency/tokens. Evidence: export_results_json_csv_live-shared.png

criteria.name: no_storage_reload_seeded

criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Storage was empty and reload restored seeded state, but the complete required workflow was not successfully exercised. Evidence: reload-shared.png

criteria.name: success_messages_are_specific
criteria.description: Where the app renders toasts after creating, deleting, completing a run, or Copy, they state what happened (including Copied) rather than vague affirmations
criteria.reasoning: Observed messages are specific: “Suite created,” “Evaluation complete,” and “Copied,” with explanatory details. Evidence: copy-success-shared.png
